properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v3 v4 v4 v6 v4

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: From the first break of light To last days Every echo of time Every evening face You always been there

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: From a baby's first cry To last breathe Every fight in our minds Every victory dance You've always been there

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Ancient One, so amazing Unfailing You are Holy One, overwhelming My heart with Your love

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Yahweh, Yahweh Faithful God, You're here to stay Yahweh, Yahweh Forever and always the same

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Where the sky meets the sea And breaks free When compassion and love Are met with me You've always been there

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: /: All consuming Everlasting God almighty Lord of glory :/ x8
